headline: Masco (MAS) Is Up 11.2% After Q1 Beat, Buybacks And Leadership Shake-Up - What's Changed
summary: In April 2026, Masco Corporation reported first-quarter 2026 results showing sales of US$1,918 million and net income of US$213 million, with earnings per share of US$1.05, while also maintaining full-year earnings guidance and continuing substantial share repurchases. Alongside these results, Masco signaled confidence in its operations and capital allocation by emphasizing bolt-on acquisition opportunities, executing material buybacks under two programs, and implementing senior leadership...
